# Pull Request Checklist

## What does this do?

Describe the change in plain language.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Category

Select one:

- [ ] CORE
- [ ] API
- [ ] UI
- [ ] TEST
- [ ] UX
- [ ] UOR
- [ ] DOC

## User behavior enabled

What can a user do after this change?

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `pytest tests/`
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Existing demo flow still works
- [ ] No raw digests exposed in UI unless explicitly debugging
- [ ] No new feature without a user path

## Screenshots / notes

Add screenshots or before/after notes if this touches UI/UX.

## Known limits

List anything this PR does not solve.
